item.description:
# Reflex 1.1.2
## Wireless mouse recovery
- Mouse Remapping now stays enabled when the Evoluent disconnects during a battery change. - Remapping resumes automatically after the mouse reconnects and native pointer delivery is verified. - Reflex remains safely passive if macOS has not restored native mouse handling. - Sleep, wake, and login-session transitions no longer change the user's Mouse Remapping setting.

# Reflex 1.1.1
## Update status
- Successful update checks now show the time they completed. - The last successful check remains visible after restarting Reflex. - A successful “no update available” result no longer appears as a failed check.

# Reflex 1.1.0
## Automatic updates
- Reflex now checks quietly for signed updates once a day. - Use **Check for Updates…** from the right-click menu whenever you want to check immediately. - A subtle dot on the menu-bar icon lets you know when an update is ready.
## Mouse responsiveness
- Reduced Reflex processing overhead by 98% for pointer movement, 97% for scrolling, and 78% for clicks. - Preserved raw HID event ordering so quick button-down and button-up events cannot be reordered.
